title: ORDER BY handling with indexes on expressions
poc: SELECT * FROM t1 ORDER BY x+0,y;
SELECT * FROM t1 ORDER BY x+0, y;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY ignores subsequent expressions with indexed expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, b TEXT, c REAL, d INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM t2 ORDER BY a+0, b;
